title: Subqueries, CTEs, Set Operations, and Relational Reasoning
description: Operations needs reusable query stages for backlog comparisons, missing relationships, and cohorts across time windows. Learners cumulatively produce a composable backlog-analysis query pipeline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose scalar, row, and table subqueries whose cardinality matches their surrounding expression.
Distinguish correlated subqueries and use EXISTS or NOT EXISTS for semijoin and antijoin questions.
Use CTEs to name query stages while distinguishing readability from materialization guarantees.
